PowerShell($adminAuth = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/_superusers/auth-with-password" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"identity":"admin@warehousemanager.app","password":"WarehouseAdmin2026x"}'; $token = $adminAuth.token; $collections = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/storage_units" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Method GET; $collections | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($t = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/_superusers/auth-with-password" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"identity":"admin@warehousemanager.app","password":"WarehouseAdmin2026x"}'\).token; $c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/work_orders" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; $fields = $c.fields | ForEach-Object { $f = $_; if \($f.name -eq "status"\) { $f.values = @\("PENDING","IN_PROGRESS","REVIEW","DONE"\) }; $f }; $body = @{ fields = $fields } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/work_orders" -Method PATCH -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $t"} -Body $body; \($r.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "status" }\).values)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/_superusers/auth-with-password" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"identity":"admin@warehousemanager.app","password":"WarehouseAdmin2026x"}'; $token = $r.token; $col = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://pocketbase-production-e699.up.railway.app/api/collections/chat_messages" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $typeField = $col.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "type" }; $typeField | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)
